text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after T.M. Opera O has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. It seems the time has finally come,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We must break the seal on Pandora's box and
unleash its dormant hopes and dreams upon the
world!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, bring forth the box!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas, this is almost woeful... Have you forgotten
about our prize?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Think back, Trainer! We were strolling through
the shopping district during the New Year's
holiday...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the ticket for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A hot spring vacation? How delightful. I would
dare depart this instant, if only I could.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Close it with wax using the king's seal and keep it
safe until the appropriate time comes.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now do you recall?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, and now that the Twinkle Series has ended, a
period of rest is in order.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The Centurial Overlord requires centurial
rejuvenation! Let us make for the Centurial Hot
Springs!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There aren't actually any hot springs of that
name, but we manage to find our vacation spot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We soak ourselves in the hot spring.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... The water is fine, indeed. But now... Ahh! I feel an urge.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The hot water has soaked into my already
gorgeous skin, making it glisten like a freshly-cut
diamond.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Tonight, the midnight sun awaits, for my beauty
shall illuminate the world long after sunset.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My enhanced resplendence will become a
fountain bursting with pristine water!
choice_data_list: Do you want to try the kaiseki tasting menu?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Do you even need an answer? Let us go!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Peculiar... My ascension to Centurial Overlord has
not fazed you in the slightest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Opera O's monologue now finished, we go
back to our room and enjoy the delicious food.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, that was absolutely divine. My
preoccupation may be with the Western arts, but
an Eastern flare is nice every now and again.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
By the way, Trainer. Now is the perfect
opportunity to ask...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Are your evaluations of me truly accurate?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Very well, I shall explain.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am strong! I am fast! I am proud and invincible!
Tens of thousands have made that realization.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You have spoken of my strength and
complimented my skills, which is fine.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But I am also beautiful on top of all that! Just as I
have said many times before.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You have rarely, if at all, described me with this
word.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It may be my imagination... But your ability to
judge aesthetics may be lacking.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's upset I don't compliment her looks, I guess.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So, I ask you now. If you feel that I am not
beautiful, you are free to say so.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Your opinion has no impact on the truth. I am beautiful, regardless of what you think.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And yet, even if so, I wish to hear it! I want to be
clear on your feelings.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Do you think that I am... beautiful?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: How do I respond? I take a moment and say...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Really? Do you truly, truly believe so?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I-I see...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Wait a moment! No, no, no!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Your expression is all wrong. It should be more...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Dramatic, poetic... or flamboyant, at the very
least!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Your flat, straight answer... How am I supposed
build anything from that?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: There is just no... operatic impact.
choice_data_list: All I did was say what I think.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... Stop, please. You assault me with your
purity.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I lack experience in these heart-to-heart
situations. You must add a bit of humor... or
something...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Daaah! I am done for... This is dire... What is this
place?! What lies beneath these hot springs?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The aura of the Centurial Overlord is... melting
away... I surrender! I wave the white flaaag!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Of all things, this has turned out to be Opera O's
weak point, leaving her totally vulnerable.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Pant... I must... overcome!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Before this vacation is over, I must become
resistant to your guileless diction.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A tactical retreat to the thermae is in order! I shall
return once my vigor has been restored!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Do not forget this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a siege at the hot springs. Next, I shower her
in a heavier volley of compliments.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Opera O and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
